features: NATURAL COLOUR CONCEALER: Systeme Instant Spray, conceals root regrowth, turns grey roots back to your desired colour. Available in 5 shades.
QUICK FIX ROOT COVER: Systeme Instant Spray, quick and easy to apply to clean dry hair. Shake well before use, spray a small amount 10cm away from the hair roots.

INSTANT REFRESH ANYTIME: Systeme Instant Spray, coverage whenever and wherever you need. Colour stays in place through daily brushing and combing. Easily washed out with a single normal shampoo application.

SYSTEME FOR COMPLETE HAIR CARE: Systeme cares for hair, root concealer spray, 10 minute semi permanent root touch up, semi-permanent and permanent home hair colour, shampoo, conditioner, styling wax and hairspray. Search amazon.co.uk to explore the range.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Instant hair root concealer spray, 75ml
description: Product Description Systeme cares for hair, root concealer spray, 10 minute semi permanent root touch up, semi-permanent and permanent home hair colour, shampoo, conditioner, styling wax and hairspray. Search amazon.co.uk to explore the range. Systeme Instant Spray, conceals root regrowth, turns grey roots back to your desired colour, available in 5 shades. Systeme Instant Spray, quick and easy to apply to clean dry hair. Shake well before use, spray a small amount 10cm away from the hair roots. Systeme Instant Spray, coverage whenever and wherever you need. Colour stays in place through daily brushing and combing. Easily washed out with a single normal shampoo application. Instant hair root concealer spray, 75ml Directions Shake well before use. Spray a small amount 10cm away from the hair roots. Color stays in place through daily brushing and combing. Easily washed out with a single normal shampoo application.
